entity.country_or_origin: smartBCH, BNB Chain, and Base ecosystems
entity.summary: Multichain automated-market-maker decentralized exchange originating in the smartBCH ecosystem and retaining current liquidity and spot trading activity across BNB Chain, Base, and smartBCH.
entity.notes: DefiLlama identifies Goblins AMM as a decentralized exchange originating on smartBCH and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume across BNB Chain, Base, and smartBCH. The dedicated application URL is preserved by the current protocol registry but was not fully fetched during this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: Goblins AMM official application
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party application URL is linked from the current protocol registry but could not be fully fetched in this review pass, so URL status remains live_unverified.

evidence.title: Goblins AMM metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Goblins AMM as a DEX and reports current TVL plus non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume across BNB Chain, Base, and smartBCH, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Goblins AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Goblins AMM as a decentralized exchange and corroborates the multichain exchange identity.
